ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-11-2021 Continued To Sep-07-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-14-2021 Continued To Aug-11-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-16-2021 Continued To Jul-14-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-07-2021 Continued To Jun-16-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion, via ZOOM, counsel for the San Francisco Public Administrator, Administrator.

At the outset, the court queries as to the status of the petition for substituted judgment. Ms. Mannion advises that the petition has been filed with a JUN-07-2021 hearing date. After further discussion, this matter was continued to JUN-16-2021.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Lee. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-10-2021 Continued To Apr-07-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-16-2020 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-21-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Ms. Mannion stated that she filed the nomination and declination to act on May 9th. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Status on close of estate is set for November 16, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
